summary: Comprehensive testing of new CaseDesk AI features: Theme toggle, User invitation system, and enhanced AI assistant. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent
design_issues.details: This is an accessibility warning from Radix UI Dialog component, should add description for screen readers

passed_tests: Theme toggle button in sidebar (sun/moon icon) - switches between dark/light mode
Theme toggle persists CSS classes on document root (dark/light)
Theme dropdown in Settings > User Preferences tab works
Settings > Benutzer tab visible for admin users
User management shows active users list
User management shows pending invitations (2 found)
Benutzer einladen button opens invite dialog with email input
Invitation API - validate existing invitation token
Invitation API - reject invalid invitation tokens
Invitation API - create new invitation returns URL and expiry
Registration page /register/{token} shows valid invitation info
Registration page has email pre-filled and password fields
User settings API - get/update theme and language
AI chat endpoint accepts messages and returns session_id
AI status endpoint shows provider configuration
action_items: Minor: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for accessibility (LOW priority)
seed_data_creation: Created test invitations during testing - can be cleaned up if needed
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features added in this iteration: 1) ThemeContext.js provides theme toggle functionality with localStorage persistence and CSS variable updates. 2) User invitation system with POST /api/users/invite creates invitations, GET /api/auth/invitation/{token} validates them, POST /api/auth/register/{token} creates new users. 3) AI Assistant at /ai page can receive queries and has full document context loaded. SMTP email sending returns false if not configured (expected behavior). All core features working correctly.

theme_toggle.details: Sidebar toggle switches between dark/light, Settings dropdown also works, CSS classes properly applied

user_invitation.details: Admin can invite users via Settings > Benutzer tab, invitation dialog collects email/role, API creates invitation with URL, registration page validates token and shows form

ai_assistant.details: AI chat page loads, accepts input, backend receives full document context including all_documents, all_cases, open_tasks, upcoming_events
